reviews.review_description: 100 times better than SuperHot. You can shoot with bow, catch axes and throw away, Boss fights and alot of levels.

reviews.review_title: Ok so how the hell isn't this more well
reviews.review_description: So it's basically super hot with next gen looking graphics. I seriously don't know how they got this to work on a quest. I'm sure happy they did though. Great job dev team! Can't wait to see what you do next

developer_response.body: Thanks a million! We're happy to know you enjoy our game. More will follow:)

reviews.review_description:
I haven’t gone too far in yet, I think 4th or 5th level.

So it’s not an exaggeration, this is legit Super Hot with a cross bow and slow motion tactics. They even give it an homage with the “next level” block that dissolves when you touch it. 

I didn’t see other options for usage of weapons, but I did notice that if you’re super precise in your grip you can catch a weapon flying at you. It’s not easy I find.

There are bosses apparently as I have reached the first one and I have not beat it yet.

Overall great stuff but it doesn’t seem as intricate as the mechanics and possibilities of Super Hot, but I’m very happy someone finally made a game similar as I don’t see a sequel to super hot anytime soon. 

70+ games 

L I N K T R , 
                    E E
                          /
                            D I S C O U N T
                                                  F U R Y

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you enjoy our game:)

reviews.review_description: Very good game, but short with only 14 levels. Hope it get more levels.

I love Superhot and I love archery in VR. This is a brilliant combination of my two loves!

Get 25% off with this link: https://bit.ly/PresentimentOfDeath

First off I personally am enjoying it. Its difficult  and fun. But, the Bow feels not right. I've played quite a bit of holopoint at times and the draw is smooth and the arrow grab options like over the shoulder or arrow in hand make a big difference. The grab feels easier on those to both the bow and the string. That's my opinion though. 

Enemies move perhaps a bit too fast but modifiers are built for those tastes. 

Maybe a last chance  melee knife or hand held arrow strike for when they're really up on you. 

Noticed you can shoot knives out of the air but if you could deflect by tapping them with the bow...

This really is as good as what everyone else is saying. The high rating is for real.

Short, but oh so sweet!  Superhot with archery! Who could ask for more?  Looks really nice!  Sets a great mood with the slo mo and classical music.  It feels like the Matrix crossed with iRobot.  This should be on the main store!!!
Recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for such a kind feedback! We strive to get into the main store one day:)

reviews.review_description: If you wondering what to do with yourself this evening, I definitely advise you to play this game and enjoy beautiful levels and accurate archery!
Love the game play love the graphics keeping up Devs

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite games on quest
reviews.review_description:
I’ve spent maybe 30 ish minutes in the game and it’s very entertaining. The classical music will helps me with losing my patience and it actually made the game feel less quite which superhot was just the sounds in game. Now I have a few requests I think it would be cool if you would be able to hit them with your bow when they’re up close and personal or just be able to use a arrow to kill time and it breaks after, my other request is more minor and you would have to push the trigger and grip to get a arrow just hitting the trigger feels a little off. 

The it’s a great experience and I’d completely recommend and great job on developing this amazing game

developer_response.body: Thanks for your kind words! We glad you enjoyed our game. Your requests have been forwarded to the developers, your feedback is important to us:)

reviews.review_title: Become an Artist of the Bow
reviews.review_description:
Presentiment of Death is more then just a SuperHot VR clone. It's a game where you just don't master the bow, but become an artist of the bow.
The game is completely played by physically moving in your VR space. Take in the classical music, feel it inside, then pick up your bow and wisp arrows through the air into your enemies. 

This game will move you physically and mentally. This is no cake walk of a game though. It will take time and skill to master the art of the bow. Your dexterity and reaction time will be put to the test. If you are a fan of SuperHot and want to feel like John Wick armed with a bow, this is a must play game.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/nhQFy6tjQSo
I adore how this game plays, looks and the music choice, it is an ideal way to reduce stress while keeping your mind alert.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, your words make us smile!

reviews.review_description:
Sweet bow action. It's like superhot but with great classical music. And did I mention a bow?

b i t , l y / P O D V R

developer_response.body: Thank you a lot for your nice feedback!

reviews.review_description: Best game soundtrack. Some trouble with tracking and aiming but over all a fantastic game. This game with the physics of in death unchained would be the perfect game.
I’ve been waiting for the release and this game is really worth it to buy and play right now! It’s absolutely amazing

If you want to dive into the world of Superhot with a bow then go here! I enjoy that game and now this one has become my favorite too! This is a very interesting idea on the part of the developers, it allows you to take a fresh look at Superhot and play both games again with great pleasure
